name: Standard 4D AI Fluency Assessment
description: The default assessment covering all four dimensions of AI fluency: Delegation, Description, Discernment, and Diligence. Uses equal weighting across dimensions. Suitable for general workforce assessment across all roles and industries.

name: Developer AI Fluency Assessment
description: Tailored assessment for software developers and technical roles. Emphasizes Delegation (AI-assisted coding, code review) and Discernment (validating AI-generated code, detecting hallucinated APIs).

name: Analyst AI Fluency Assessment
description: Tailored assessment for data analysts and research roles. Emphasizes Description (precise prompting for data tasks) and Discernment (verifying AI-generated statistics and detecting bias in analysis).

name: Manager AI Fluency Assessment
description: Tailored assessment for people managers and team leads. Emphasizes Delegation (orchestrating AI across team workflows) and Diligence (governance, transparency, and ethical AI adoption).

name: Marketer AI Fluency Assessment
description: Tailored assessment for marketing and communications roles. Emphasizes Description (creative prompting, brand voice) and Diligence (attribution, transparency in AI-generated content).
